tool.name: js_link_extractor
tool.description: Extract API endpoints, secrets, and sensitive data from JavaScript files.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Extract API endpoints from JavaScript code - Find leaked secrets and credentials - Discover domains and external services - Identify authentication and admin endpoints - Detect AWS keys, JWT tokens, API keys

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The extraction action to perform: - extract_all: Extract endpoints, secrets, and domains - extract_endpoints: Extract API endpoints only - extract_secrets: Extract potential secrets only - extract_domains: Extract domains and URLs only

parameter.name: include_comments
parameter.description: Whether to include commented code in analysis (default: false)

returns.description: Extracted endpoints, secrets, domains, and analysis summary
